creator: kob6558@gmail.com
text:
I have three nearly identical systems and I see this on only one. All
systems are running the same version of gcc. The failing system is
running 18 July 9-STABLE while the 9-STABLE on the others is about ten
days older. Failing system is i386. Working systems are amd64 and
i386. ll ports (other then vlc) are up to date on all systems. I can't
seem to come up with what is the trigger.
-- 
R. Kevin Oberman, Network Engineer
E-mail: kob6558@gmail.com
